---
title: "ascatc_multiday_functions.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../ascat.html)

Shared functions for ASCAT-C multi-day and monthly composite generation.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/ascat/src/ascatc_multiday_functions.py >}}
```

:::
